name: auth-flow
description: Complete authentication flow with login, registration, session middleware, and NextAuth configuration
author: AD AI Engine
instructions:
1. Install dependencies: npm install next-auth @prisma/client bcrypt zod
2. Add NEXTAUTH_SECRET and NEXTAUTH_URL to .env
3. Run npx prisma db push to create User/Session tables
4. Wrap your app with SessionProvider from next-auth/react
5. Use AuthMiddleware in API routes to protect endpoints
